reasoning: Hans Niemann's FIDE ranking on October 26, 2025 will be based on the October rating list, where he was ranked #15. During this event (Oct 17), Niemann defeated Abhimanyu Mishra and his live ranking reportedly reached #13. Even after any normal variance at the end of the US Championship, his rating buffer and recent peak strongly suggest he will be #15 or better on the November rating list. Thus, the probabilities for Nov 02 and Nov 25 (which both rely on the Nov 1 list) are highly favourable. For Jan 24 (which uses the Jan 1 list), uncertainty increases since December often features rapid/blitz events but also potential classical events where rating changes could bump him down. Consequently, the Jan date is assigned a probability closer to the base rate.
